title: Conquest of the Bleak Isles
description: A low-fantasy modpack focused on survival, economy, roleplay, and dungeon delving. Featuring Conquest Reforged and enhanced world generation tools. Designed for both Singleplayer and our survival server.
body:
# Details  
A **low-fantasy, dark survival** modpack crafted for the Bleak Isles survival RP server. Supports both our **Server** or **Singleplayer** play. Featuring **Conquest Reforged** at its core and enhanced world generation tools to create hauntingly beautiful terrain, the pack emphasizes:

- ⚔️ **Faction-driven roleplay**  
- 🏘️ **Player-run economies & settlements**  
- 🗺️ **Challenging survival gameplay**  
- 🏰 **Dungeon delving & exploration**  
- ⚖️ **Grounded, immersive mechanics**  
- 🧭 **Custom classes and character backgrounds**

Choose from unique **classes and backgrounds** to shape your character’s skills, profession, and place in the world. Whether you're a hardened frontiersman, a silver-tongued merchant, a clandestine scholar, or a wandering sellsword, your role has purpose.

The Bleak Isles are not kind to those who walk alone. **Survival depends on cooperation**—builders, traders, warriors, and explorers must work together to thrive. Every class contributes to the whole, and every story is forged in fellowship.

Join our Discord to become part of the story, whether you're playing with us or want to share your singleplayer journey with others: [https://discord.gg/D4vbqxp5z8](https://discord.gg/D4vbqxp5z8)
# Key Mods & Features  
This pack includes a carefully curated set of popular and immersive mods to support a seamless RP and survival experience:

- 🏛️ **Conquest Reforged** – Essential for detailed medieval building and stylistic world design.  
- 🌄 **Distant Horizons** – Smooth LOD rendering for breathtaking long-range views.  
- 🕳️ **Better Cave Dweller** – Enhanced version of the Cave Dweller.
- ⚔️ **Better Combat** – Modern, fluid combat mechanics with expanded weapon support.  
- 👪 **Minecraft Comes Alive: Reborn** – NPCs with depth, dialogue, and relationships as well as a character creation screen.  
- 📜 **Class-Based RPG Series** – Armor and weapons specialised to unique classes.  
- 🧰 **Performance Mods** – Includes top optimization mods (like FerriteCore, Lithium, etc.) for smoother gameplay.  
- 🎮 **Controller Support** – Plug-and-play compatibility for controller-based players.  
- 🧬 **Origins: Classes & Backgrounds** – Pick a backstory and profession; custom races coming soon.  
- 🔊 **Complete Sound Overhaul** – Richer, more immersive ambient and environmental audio.  
# The Setting  
Ancient empires, long since crumbled, have left only weathered stones and nameless ruins to mark their passing. The Bleak Isles are a land of quiet decay, where the past lingers like a half-forgotten dream—spoken of only in hushed fables and the superstitions of wary townsfolk. What came before—the true history of this place—has been swallowed by time, leaving behind scattered relics and the hollow echoes of things once great.

![Daily prayers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e69b764408ecc310e0bf21b219f8f59a4ba4a486.jpeg)

Magic, if it ever truly existed, has faded into legend. Each people bears the marks of an ancestry long obscured. The isles endure—battered by ceaseless winds, veiled in deep forests, and haunted by the forgotten. The world offers no promises. Here, **survival is the only certainty**, and history is but a tale whispered by firelight. Where and when we are is uncertain.

![Building a farmstead](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c453cffdd202a22287d7a9a02200680ac147ab73.jpeg)
---

### 🔧 We recommend allocating at least **8GB of RAM** via Modrinth to ensure smooth performance!
